warnings.detail: Exact metadata still requires a direct verification fetch.
Repository metadata reports size 0. No deletion/archive inference is permitted.
Default branch is dev; branch inventory must use repository metadata rather than main/master assumptions.
Inspect credentials, endpoints, deployment artifacts and sensitive configuration before migration.
Inspect secrets, business data and unique domain logic before any family consolidation.
Security/authentication repository. Inspect secrets, credentials, endpoints, user data and deployment configuration before any migration or consolidation; do not expose sensitive values in reports.
Size equality is not evidence of duplicate content. Commit and tree comparison is required.
Review secrets, authentication configuration, connection strings, endpoints, deployment files and private business logic before migration.
Metadata reports 598607 KB. Inspect large/generated files, binaries, history, credentials and business data before any migration decision.

Owner reports that the job repeatedly fails and wants it stopped. Disable the deployed/scheduled job through the operational environment, not by mutating source during this read-only audit. Preserve the repository and inspect current files plus full history without exposing secrets.

Owner confirms this is the most important project. Preserve independently, prioritize architecture/dependency/recovery analysis, and inspect generated assets, binaries, credentials, deployment configuration and private offer/business data.

Confirmed as the .NET 5 ERP backend paired with an Angular frontend. It contains features needed for restoration. Do not archive or reduce it to a generic sample; map API contracts, database schema, dependencies and security configuration.
Determine upstream provenance and licenses; review server permissions, command execution and credential handling before reuse.
Metadata reports 227800 KB and default branch mostafa. Inspect every branch, generated assets, binaries, credentials, deployment configuration and student/business data before migration.
Metadata reports 191768 KB. Determine upstream provenance and licenses; review model assets, desktop-control permissions, command execution and credential access before reuse.
Inspect identity secrets, signing material, user data, database schema, deployment configuration and relationship to the ERP family before migration.
Preserve independently and compare API contracts, database schema, manifests, branches and commit history with BackEndNet5, 105-1001SASERP811V37Dev and related ERP repositories.

Metadata reports 144584 KB. Inspect student/business data, generated assets, binaries, credentials, deployment configuration and relationship to Skoola_NET20241122 and WytSky.Mobile.Maui.Skoola before migration.
Metadata reports 68131 KB. Preserve independently; inspect API contracts, database schema, credentials, deployment configuration and relationship to Event/CPD repositories.
Metadata reports 942153 KB. Determine fork/upstream lineage, licenses, vendored assets, models, datasets, secrets and deployment implications before adoption or migration.
Metadata reports 189875 KB. Inspect credentials, signing keys, identity/user data, generated binaries, history and deployment configuration; do not expose sensitive values.
Metadata reports 254091 KB. Inspect student/business data, binaries, secrets, deployment configuration, branches and lineage against Skoola_NET20241122 and Appskoola-net.
Metadata reports 567704 KB. Inspect student/chat data, binaries, generated assets, credentials, deployment configuration, history and relationship to eZee20211206 before migration.
Default branch is dev and the project is a computer-vision/home-automation candidate. Review every branch, upstream provenance, licenses, camera/media privacy, models and permissions.
Metadata reports size 0. Do not infer emptiness or disposability; inspect all branches, commits and refs.

This repository expands the CMGS Windows email-service family. Compare code/history with CMGSWindowsServiceSendEmailVwithapikey; keep source unchanged and disable the failing deployed job only through the operational environment.
Review upstream provenance, licenses, local/cloud processing, microphone permissions, stored recordings/transcripts, telemetry and model assets before reuse.
Review upstream provenance, licenses, Kubernetes cluster permissions, deployment manifests, supply-chain controls and credential handling before adoption.
